symbolic_kl_nonnegativity.claim: KL(p||q) ≥ 0 for 2-element distributions, equality iff p=q

numerical_inequality_chain.claim: 0 ≤ V_const ≤ V_lin ≤ V_MLP(2) ≤ V_MLP(8) ≤ V_MLP(32,32) ≤ I = log 2

citation_for_part_a_proper: Xu, Zhao, Song, Stewart, Ermon (2020), 'A Theory of Usable Information Under Computational Constraints', ICLR — Proposition 1. We restate the inequality and verify the analytic content (KL ≥ 0) symbolically, plus the chain of inequalities numerically on the XOR DGP.
